calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings Not Reported.

Plaintiff Insurance Company of the West is represented by Christian Cascou, Esq.
Defendant Wheelcare Express, Inc. not appearing.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Insurance Company of the West, and against Defendant Wheelcare Express, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $101,272.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $838.20
4. Attorney fees: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $102,110.20

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
